overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person drive through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The player navigates from street level under an overpass, onto an elevated highway, through dense commercial districts with heavy neon signage, and finally arrives at a pharmaceuticals building. The footage features high-quality ray-traced lighting and a distinctive teal-green car interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor area under overpass transitioning to highway on-ramp

events.description: vehicle moves from under the overpass onto the elevated highway ramp
accelerating from slow speed to highway cruising speed

agents.ego_description: starting the vehicle from a stop under the overpass and accelerating onto the highway ramp

entered.detail: large concrete overpass spanning the street with visible support beams
illuminated vendor tents with neon signs and canopies
metal guardrails along the elevated road edge
distant futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins stationary under a concrete overpass with street food stalls visible to the right. The driver accelerates onto an elevated highway ramp, transitioning from the enclosed street level to the open highway with the city skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with panoramic city views

events.description: maintaining steady high speed along the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed along the elevated highway with the city skyline ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens and digital displays along the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving along the elevated highway with guardrails on both sides, the city skyline grows larger ahead. Large digital billboards line the right side of the road as the vehicle maintains a steady high speed through the open air.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk commercial street with heavy neon signage

events.description: exiting highway into dense commercial district with towering buildings
navigating through intersection with dense pedestrian activity on sidewalks

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow streets lined with towering buildings covered in neon advertisements and signs

notable_agents.action: walking on sidewalk near the hotel entrance

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading HOTEL on building facade
dense cluster of illuminated advertisements and holographic displays covering building faces
tall buildings with mixed neon signage creating a canyon-like street effect

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the highway into a densely packed commercial district where buildings are covered in vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements. A prominent pink HOTEL sign marks the right side as the car navigates through the narrow, canyon-like streets with pedestrians visible on the sidewalks.

events.description: slowing down significantly while approaching the destination building
coming to a complete stop in front of the pharmaceuticals building

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a stop in front of the pharmaceuticals building entrance

entered.detail: building facade with bright teal neon sign reading PHARMACEUTICALS above the entrance
wooden barricade fencing along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dense commercial core, the vehicle enters a quieter industrial-commercial zone and slows to a stop in front of a building with a prominent teal PHARMACEUTICALS neon sign. The surrounding area features industrial fencing and less dense signage than the previous district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from the enclosed shadows of a street-level overpass into a sprawling neon metropolis and finally to a quiet industrial destination. It begins stationary beside street food stalls before accelerating up a ramp, shifting from the concrete confinement of the underpass to the open air of an elevated highway with the city skyline looming ahead. As the vehicle maintains high speed, the view expands to include towering digital billboards and guardrails before the camera descends from the highway into a dense commercial district. The environment then tightens into narrow, canyon-like streets filled with holographic advertisements and a prominent pink hotel sign, navigating past pedestrians under a canopy of vibrant lights. Finally, the scene opens into a quieter industrial zone as the car slows to a stop in front of a building marked by a teal pharmaceuticals neon sign and industrial fencing.
